claim: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) is being phased out because in-context learning with large models is now cheaper and more reliable than retrieval + augmentation
actionable: For new AI projects, skip RAG pipelines—instead provide all necessary context directly to the model upfront when the context fits within your token budget
source_title: Why the Best AI Coding Tools Abandoned RAG (And What They Use Instead)

claim: Code execution in AI coding tools enables better problem-solving than pure language because it provides feedback loops and verifiable output
actionable: When building tools, prioritize sandbox code execution (bash, python) over text-only outputs to enable iteration and self-correction
source_title: Why the Best AI Coding Tools Abandoned RAG (And What They Use Instead)

claim: Larger context windows reduce the need for RAG because models can now process thousands of tokens of documentation directly
actionable: With 200k+ token models, consider including full documentation/code files in context rather than retrieving snippets
source_title: Why the Best AI Coding Tools Abandoned RAG (And What They Use Instead)
